certified_capabilities: Verifies invocation, dispatch, assignment, authorization, execution packet, Worker identity, replay, authority, chain, and hash continuity.
Binds Worker output to allowed outputs, forbidden operations, execution packet scope, and Worker scope.
Persists result capture evidence, classification, artifact, and result.
Supports Filesystem Worker, Monitoring Worker, and approved Trading Improvement acceptance flows.
Integrates CLI progression from Worker Invocation to Worker Result Capture.

validation_commands.command: python -m pytest tests/test_worker_result_capture_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_assignment_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_invocation_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_authorization_runtime_v1.py tests/test_ready_for_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_worker_runtime_v1.py tests/test_dispatch_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_runtime_v1.py tests/test_result_runtime_v1.py tests/test_execution_request_runtime_v1.py tests/test_implementation_plan_to_execution_request_runtime_v1.py

remaining_blockers_before_first_governed: A governed result validation runtime must consume WORKER_RESULT_CAPTURE_ARTIFACT_V1.
Result validation must verify validation requirements, output scope, forbidden-operation absence, Worker scope, packet scope, replay continuity, authority continuity, and hash continuity.
Post-execution replay review and termination remain separate downstream certifications.
